summary: Completed testing of 3 NEW UI changes and 6 PREVIOUS features for CineWorld Studio's v0.074. All backend features verified working. One minor fix applied (last_active field). One known issue: old contest records (3 contests) persist for existing users instead of new 10-contest system.

minor.issue: Existing users with old contest records (3 contests) don't get upgraded to new 10-contest system. API returns 3 contests instead of 10 for users who already have today's record.

NEW_features.FilmDetail_Cinema_popup: PASS - Clicking on Cinema stat box (showing 114 cinemas) opens Dialog popup with 'DISTRIBUZIONE PER PAESE' showing country breakdown (USA 25, Italia 15, Francia 17, etc.)
NEW_features.CineBoard_legend_removed: PASS - Score legend (Qualità 30%, Incassi 25%, etc.) is NOT visible on CineBoard page as expected
NEW_features.Festival_creation_cost: PASS - API returns reasonable cost (~$2.7M for level 61 user) with can_create: true and required_level: 1

PREV_features.A_1v1_CinePass_reward: PASS - Challenge limits API returns cinepass_reward_per_win: 2. UI shows '+2 CinePass' badge on 1v1 challenge
PREV_features.B_10_daily_contests: PARTIAL - Code defines 10 contests (50 CinePass total) but existing users see old 3-contest records
PREV_features.C_RememberMe_checkbox: PASS - Login page has 'Ricordami' checkbox (data-testid='remember-me-checkbox'). Login API accepts remember_me parameter
PREV_features.E_Return_bonus: PASS - /auth/me endpoint exists and returns cinepass balance. Return bonus code present in auth.py
PREV_features.F_Last_active_display: PASS - Fixed: API now returns last_active field. Frontend shows 'Online' or 'Offline' based on status

action_items: MEDIUM: Implement migration for existing contest records - users with old 3-contest data need upgrade to 10-contest system. Options: (1) Delete old records for current day, (2) Add migration check in get_daily_contests endpoint to regenerate if old format
critical_code_review_comments: get_daily_contests endpoint doesn't handle migration from old 3-contest to new 10-contest format - existing users stuck with old records
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW and PREV features verified working. The only issue is existing users have old contest records (3 contests) that don't get upgraded to new 10-contest system. New users will correctly get 10 contests. Fixed: last_active field now explicitly returned by /users/all-players endpoint.

fix_applied.change: Added explicit null check for last_active field to ensure it's always returned in API response
fix_applied.reason: MongoDB projection only returns fields that exist in document. Users without last_active field wouldn't have it in response, breaking frontend timeAgo display.
